site.status: expanded data canonicalized and behavior-verifier live verified at commit c8730570da53
site.plus_half_requires: Wire canon, behavior, bundle, and source-link verification into CI or a scheduled audit job, then add dedicated coverage for social-preview card screenshots and PDF content text extraction.
Compact the mobile cookie banner so fresh visits keep the first-screen editorial context and primary CTAs visible at 390px and 430px.
Verify trust-page navigation plus evidence labels at 390px and 430px in a real browser session, then finish a locale-by-locale audit of the evidence taxonomy strings.
Verify the auth upgrade/downgrade experience at 390px and 430px in a browser session and add regression coverage for the /read reader shell as well as individual chapter routes.
Shorten access-token lifetime or add refresh rotation, then prove revocation and session expiry with automated integration coverage.

Get commit `1012c25` live in production, then operationalize npm run verify:sources in CI or a scheduled Railway/GitHub check and reduce dependence on bot-blocked third-party pages by capturing more first-party or archive-backed equivalents for the restricted set.

Confirm the public search cards render the restored chapter-type and evidence metadata live at 390px and 430px, then improve result ranking with stronger title/source weighting and topic-aware deep links.
Replace the withdrawn unsupported article pack with fully sourced current-reporting pieces so topic breadth grows without sacrificing citation integrity.
Finish the live 390px and 430px shell audit on /read, /news, and /membership, then trim mobile navigation density and route-level bundle weight without reintroducing menu sprawl.

Verify the rebuilt /institute, /institute/book, and representative course/guide routes live at 390px and 430px, confirm /llms.txt and /veritas-institute.md are reachable in production, and pressure-test the PDF/manual export on real browsers.
Hook `/api/build-info` and the live `X-Veritas-*` headers into an operator workflow or dashboard so release identity is checked automatically instead of by manual probing.

Verify the deployed route-specific title normalization across `/news`, `/profiles`, `/topics/:slug`, `/chapter/:slug`, and institute routes, then source exact article titles for dynamic news paths instead of relying on slug humanization when the client title is missing.

growth.plus_half_requires: Replace queue-only capture with portal-backed HubSpot forms, double opt-in, and workflow-level segmentation.

Validate Search Console coverage for the rebuilt institute route family plus the new /llms.txt and /veritas-institute.md assets, then confirm live crawl/index behavior after the stale deploy incident is resolved.

Verify the live title normalization and durability path after deploy, then map GA4 plus HubSpot lifecycle stages into a public or operator-visible conversion dashboard with route-specific attribution that does not collapse distinct pages into shell titles.
Verify the new trust-first `/membership` copy live at 390px and 430px, then add thank-you landing pages and campaign-level attribution on donation and recurring-support returns.
Connect the new beat-specific signup handoff to HubSpot workflows and test topic-specific onboarding against the generic archive gate.

p0_resolved: Public source-library payloads were removed from preview chapter responses.
Anonymous search no longer returns source-only matches that require authenticated source access.
Preview chapter payloads no longer expose filter metadata intended for the authenticated source browser and full-search experience.
Auth entry points now preserve intended archive destinations without defaulting every flow to signup mode.
Bearer token auth now requires a live, unexpired session row, so logout and other session invalidations revoke protected access instead of leaving tokens valid until JWT expiry.
Reader surfaces now reload scope-appropriate chapter payloads when auth state changes, preventing stale full-content payloads from lingering after logout or requiring a manual refresh after signup.

A repo-native auth smoke runner now exercises anonymous preview, register, login, full chapter unlock, source-only search, protected PDF download, logout revocation, and post-logout downgrade against the target environment.
